Our Story

A calm room,
brewed slowly.

Motram opened its doors in Al Khabra as a space built around one idea: coffee deserves patience. Every cup starts at the pour-over bar, hand-brewed and weighed to the gram, before it ever reaches your table.

Sunlit floors, warm wood and fresh flowers at the counter set the pace — this is a place to sit down, not rush through. From our signature white mocha to a fresh V60, everything is made to order, cup by cup.
